name: Stuffed Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup scallions or onions, finely chopped
500 g ground beef (preferably not too lean)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meat mixture: Combine ground beef, 2 eggs, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
2. Stuff the artichokes: Cut each artichoke in half lengthwise and scoop out a small amount of the inner flesh to create a pocket.
Fill each pocket with the meat mixture, ensuring it is evenly distributed but not overly stuffed.
3. Prepare the egg wash: In a shallow dish, whisk together 1 remaining egg and 2 tablespoons water.
Add salt and mix until well combined.
4. Prepare the tomato sauce: In a large pot, combine tomato sauce, lemon juice, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Cook the artichokes: Arrange the stuffed artichoke halves cut-side down in the simmering tomato sauce.
Cover and gently simmer for about 30 minutes, or until the artichokes are tender when pierced with a fork.
6. Finish cooking: Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly before serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
